title: Important Notice: Extension of Exemption Exam Deadline
content:
Important Notice: Extension of Exemption Exam Deadline

Dear Students

We would like to inform you that the deadline for the Exemption Exam has been extended until

5:00 PM on Wednesday, 15 October 2025

.

This extension has been granted in response to technical difficulties experienced earlier today by several students attempting to access the exam. Due to unusually high traffic on the ALMS platform, some users encountered significant delays and login disruptions, preventing them from starting or completing the exam as scheduled.

To ensure equal opportunity for all eligible students and to maintain the integrity and fairness of the examination process, the exam will remain accessible until the new deadline. Students who are eligible and want to take the Exemption Exam and have not yet submitted it yet are advised to complete their exams by

5:00 PM on 15 October 2025

. No further extensions will be granted beyond this deadline.

We appreciate your patience and understanding as we work to ensure a smooth and equitable examination experience for all.

Foreign Languages Department
